## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, screenshots.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Node version: [e.g. 22.10]
- Docker version (if applicable): [e.g. 24.0.7]
- Browser (frontend bugs): [e.g. Chrome 130, Safari 17]
- Deployment: [Docker Compose / Railway / bare-metal / other]

## Logs

```
paste relevant logs here
```

## Additional context

Anything else that helps diagnose this.
